name: INNSUITES HOSPITALITY TRUST
summary: InnSuites Hospitality Trust (IHT) is an unincorporated Ohio real estate investment trust headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, taxed as a C-corporation. It owns interests in two moderate-service InnSuites hotels (Tucson, AZ and Albuquerque, NM) totaling 270 suites, provides hotel management services through majority-owned subsidiary RRF LLLP, offers trademark licensing, and holds a diversified investment in UniGen Power, Inc., a clean energy power generation company.

products.name: Hotel Operations
products.description: Ownership and operation of two moderate-service InnSuites hotels with 270 suites in Tucson, AZ and Albuquerque, NM.

products.name: Hotel Management Services
products.description: Management of daily hotel operations through RRF LLLP at 5% of room revenue plus $2,000/month accounting fee per hotel.

products.name: InnSuites Trademark Licensing
products.description: Trademark license services for InnSuites brand provided through RRF LLLP, included in the management fee.

products.name: UniGen Power Investment
products.description: Diversified investment in UniGen Power, Inc., an efficient clean energy power generation company, made in December 2019.

partnerships.description: Year-to-year membership agreements granting use of Best Western name, trademark, and reservation system in exchange for marketing and reservation fees.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
